agentTools.description: Create a new Spec change task. The frontend will scaffold proposal.md and tasks.md on disk and open the Spec workbench. Provide a concise title and a clear goal statement. Do NOT call start_spec immediately — wait for the user to confirm.

title.description: Short, URL-safe title for the Spec (e.g. 'Add login rate limit')

goal.description: One or two sentences describing what this change achieves

overview.description: Optional longer description of scope, motivation, or approach

agentTools.description: Start executing a previously created Spec. The frontend transitions the Spec state from 'draft' to 'active' and launches the spec-agent subagent to execute the tasks in tasks.md. Only call this after the user has explicitly confirmed they want to start execution.

slug.description: The slug of the Spec to start (returned by create_spec)
